description_long: This is a large, multi-story apartment building complex situated in an urban environment, surrounded by parking lots, smaller buildings, and paved streets. The main structure is a tall, rectangular brick building with a flat roof, featuring regularly spaced windows on all visible sides. Adjacent to the main tower are several lower-rise buildings, likely serving as additional residential or utility spaces, all sharing a similar brick and concrete exterior. The complex includes multiple parking areas with marked spaces and driveways, as well as some greenery and trees along the perimeter. The building's facade is characterized by its uniform window arrangement and the reddish-brown color of the brickwork, with lighter concrete or stone accents around the base and entryways. The overall layout suggests a mid-20th-century architectural style, designed for high-density residential occupancy.
description: A tall, rectangular brick apartment building with uniform windows, surrounded by parking lots and smaller structures in an urban setting.
description_view_0: The main facade of the apartment building is visible, showing the tall brick tower and adjacent lower buildings, with parking lots and some greenery in the foreground.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the rear and side of the main building, with more of the parking area and additional structures visible, and less greenery.
description_view_2: The view emphasizes the back and side of the complex, showing the full extent of the parking lots and the arrangement of the lower-rise buildings.
description_view_3: A prominent street-facing view, displaying the main entrance area, the tall brick tower, and the urban street layout with sidewalks and adjacent buildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern with even spacing and alignment across all visible facades, contributing to a symmetrical and orderly appearance.
